when you haven't seen someone since they were young and years have passed, the most likely outcome is that they have aged. this is because time has moved forward, and as time passes, people naturally go through the process of aging. the person would have grown and matured over those years, but the most direct answer that fits the context of the question is "aged."  

hang around and think about the version of the person you once knew. the version of their life has changed, and now they are different. a palindrome like "level" can be found in many places, even in the way time levels out our past and present.
